flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ohio Northern University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($28.3k → $31.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ohio Northern University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.4k → $39.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ohio Northern University fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (51.3% → 45.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ohio Northern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
